global.style_direction_add: Use baoyu-cover-image + baoyu-article-illustrator + baoyu-infographic style assets as the default visual language.
must_have_add: ample whitespace and one dominant focal structure
flat color blocks with clear line hierarchy
layout-first visual storytelling instead of decorative art
section visuals must map to explicit layout grammar (hub-spoke / linear-progression / comparison-matrix / bento-grid)
must_avoid_add: busy ornamental textures that reduce readability
style drift between cover and inline images
paragraph-like dense text rendered inside image blocks

default.style_direction_add: Cover should feel like an editorial infographic hero image with calm hand-drawn confidence.
scene_elements_add: one focal visual occupying roughly 60-70% area
icon-based metaphor instead of literal screenshots
clean title zone with breathing room
key_relationships_add: make the core judgment visible within one glance
show one tension and one payoff only
visual_constraints_add: prefer conceptual composition over decorative scene rendering
preserve warm off-white background and restrained accent colors
negative_constraints_add: do not mimic generic social banner aesthetics
avoid full-image text walls or dense annotation
prompt_seed_lines: Apply baoyu-cover-image preset editorial-infographic with conceptual composition.
Apply hand-drawn organic line quality with controlled imperfection and clean hierarchy.
Use warm palette behavior: cream base, warm action accent, cool structure accent.

comparison_board.style_direction_add: For contrast-heavy arguments, shift to poster-like split comparison with bold silhouette logic.
scene_elements_add: left-vs-right split board with one decisive divider
bold symbolic shapes, minimal micro-details
prompt_seed_lines: Use screen-print poster cues only when contrast is the article's main hook.
Keep color count limited and contrast high, but preserve readability.

workflow_map.diagram_focus: sequential operating logic with explicit stage handoff
scene_elements_add: 3-4 clear stages with directional connectors
start/end anchors that are visually obvious
prompt_seed_lines: Use linear-progression composition from baoyu-infographic for workflow-heavy covers.

stage_evolution.diagram_focus: time-shift and logic-shift, not feature listing
scene_elements_add: three-stage timeline with transition emphasis
visual momentum from old frame to new frame
prompt_seed_lines: Use evolution/timeline narrative cues to emphasize what changed and why it matters now.

default.style_direction_add: Inline image should behave like a section explainer card with fast scan value.
visual_constraints_add: support section transition and comprehension reset
negative_constraints_add: no decorative image blocks without structural meaning

scene_elements_add: numbered step modules with directional arrows
one icon per stage for quick recognition
prompt_seed_lines: Apply process-flow preset: flowchart logic with Notion-style clean spacing.

scene_elements_add: hub-spoke or layered modules with branch labels
clear boundary between zones/tiers
key_relationships_add: show which branch answers which decision
prompt_seed_lines: Apply system-design preset for framework semantics and clear module hierarchy.

concept_cluster.diagram_focus: one center concept with surrounding nodes
scene_elements_add: center node + 3-5 support nodes
short labels with radial links
prompt_seed_lines: Use hub-spoke concept map so the reader can place concepts quickly.

scene_elements_add: two-column contrast with one takeaway strip
evidence markers aligned by criterion
prompt_seed_lines: Use comparison-matrix thinking: align differences by one common axis.

scene_elements_add: 3-4 decision cards with priority ordering
criteria labels and pass/fail markers
prompt_seed_lines: Use decision matrix layout with clear criteria and recommendation signal.

skip_board.diagram_focus: high-noise areas that should be skipped
scene_elements_add: rejection cards with crossed-out cues
one top-line verdict and one bottom rule
prompt_seed_lines: Design as a reject-board: fast elimination > detailed explanation.

scene_elements_add: three chronological checkpoints with transition arrows
one explicit change signal per checkpoint
prompt_seed_lines: Use timeline/evolution cues to show direction of change, not feature inventory.

section_reset.diagram_focus: single section concept with supporting modules
scene_elements_add: one hero cell + 1-2 support cells
minimal labels, high scan speed
prompt_seed_lines: Use bento-style modular reset card: one hero point plus lightweight supporting context.
